title: NUTSMP
description: A vanilla + modpack for Cobblemon that improves travel options with waystones, flying on Pokemon, and more.
body: This Pack is a Vanilla + style modpack for Cobblemon. The purpose of this pack is to improve the standard minecraft experience while enhancing the Cobblemon experience. This includes ease of travel with Teleport stations, and ridable Pokemon. Better world structures and Village generation, and some great addons to the server side of things for Multiplayer.
